notes: v0.16.6 — Module art is live. 30 unique textures (6 slots × 5 rarities: CORE / WEAPON / SHIELD / ENGINE / WINGS / FRAME × common / uncommon / rare / epic / legendary), generated and source-cleaned with alpha-bbox trimming so every icon sits centered on transparent background. The new art shows up everywhere a module is rendered: equipped slot cards in MODULES, hex library tiles, side-dock picker rows, compare popup. Empty slots and filter chips keep the procedural neon outline. GRINDARE logo on HOME used to sit inside a 1280×731 canvas with most of it being transparent padding (the actual logo was only 385×397 in the middle) — trimmed to its real bounding box, so the same chip now displays the logo ~3x bigger automatically. Windows only.
